global_description: A large rectangular furniture piece with a flat surface for sleeping, typically featuring a frame, mattress, and bedding. Commonly made of wood or metal, with a headboard and sometimes a footboard. The mattress is covered with sheets and blankets, often in neutral or pastel colors.

part_details.frame: Wood or metal structure supporting the mattress
part_details.headboard: Upright panel at the head of the bed
part_details.footboard: Optional panel at the foot of the bed
part_details.bedding: Sheets, blankets, and pillows in various colors

spatial_relations: Headboard at the head of the bed
Footboard at the foot of the bed
